preCollege.title: JEE Preparation
preCollege.detail: Self-studied for JEE Main and Advanced, with a focus on Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.

preCollege.title: UGEE — AIR 68
preCollege.detail: Cleared IIIT Hyderabad's Undergraduate Entrance Exam with All India Rank 68, securing admission to the BTech CSE + MS CL dual-degree program.

sections.label: Monsoon Semester
sections.headline: First semester at IIIT-H
sections.notes: In DSM, built logic gates, combinational circuits, and a calculator on breadboards, alongside an online circuit simulator for the may designs. In Discrete Structures, learned about propositional logic, predicate logic, set theory, and combinatorics. In Linguistics, studied phonetics, morphology, syntax, and semantics. In Introduction to Programming, learned C programming and data structures.

projects.name: Academics UG1.1
projects.desc: Coursework, assignments, and notes from the first semester of the CLD program.

sections.headline: Linear Algebra and first Computational Linguistics project

projects.name: Personal Website
projects.desc: Started building and hosting this personal site.

projects.name: NER CRF Hindi
projects.desc: Computational Linguistics project: a CRF-based Named Entity Recognition system for Hindi.

projects.name: WebEditor
projects.desc: ISS course project — a browser-based file/document editor.

sections.label: Summer Break
sections.headline: Summer Analytics
achievements: Certificate of Completion for Summer Analytics - IIT Guwahati

sections.label: Monsoon Semester
sections.headline: Probability, Operating Systems, and Computational Linguistics-2

projects.name: Academics UG2.1
projects.desc: Assignments, question papers, and notes from the third semester.

projects.name: XV6 Scheduler
projects.desc: Implemented three different CPU schedulers on the xv6 teaching OS.

projects.name: C-Shell
projects.desc: A Unix-like shell written in C, with custom builtins (e.g. hop for cd).

projects.name: Network File System
projects.desc: Team project implementing a distributed Network File System — built the Storage Server component.

projects.name: Tic-Tac-Toe over TCP/UDP
projects.desc: Networked Tic-Tac-Toe using raw TCP and UDP sockets in C.

projects.name: ABSA CRF
projects.desc: Computational Linguistics-2: supervised and unsupervised aspect extraction; CRF outperformed unsupervised baselines for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis.

sections.label: Spring Semester
sections.headline: Industry internship
courses: Design and Analysis of Software Systems (DASS)
achievements: Received Internship Certificate from Kaizen Platforms for Software Development Internship

roles.desc: Backend development on Finease, a production-grade application — scalable logic, feature integration, and debugging within structured engineering workflows.
Began research on mechanistic and developmental interpretability under Prof. Manish Shrivastava.

sections.label: Monsoon Semester
sections.headline: Information Retrieval and NLP research projects

projects.name: Information Retrieval System
projects.desc: Built a full IR pipeline — crawler, indexer, ranker — from scratch; compared TAAT and DAAT scoring against ElasticSearch benchmarks.

projects.name: Subliminal Learning & Token Entanglement
projects.desc: Team project (Decepticons) studying representational leakage, token entanglement, and bias transfer in language models.

projects.name: Patient Risk Prediction
projects.desc: NLP project predicting 30-day hospital readmission from the MIMIC-IV dataset across several models.

sections.label: Spring Semester
sections.headline: Teaching, computational psycholinguistics, and machine unlearning

projects.name: Computational Psycholinguistics
projects.desc: Coursework and project work in computational psycholinguistics.

projects.name: Personalised Learning System
projects.desc: A system for adaptive, personalised learning.

projects.name: Machine Unlearning in VLMs
projects.desc: Evaluated targeted forgetting algorithms in vision-language models to erase specific knowledge subsets using Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs).

projects.name: Computational Psycholinguistics — Project
projects.desc: Extended project work following the coursework.

roles.desc: Designing assignments, running tutorials, and mentoring students on language modeling, syntax parsing, and sequence labeling.

projects.name: Impact of Tokenization on Machine Translation
projects.desc: Research project investigating how vocabulary size (BPE, Unigram) and segmentation choices affect NMT quality across similar language pairs.
